programmes.show_description: Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one. What more could you possibly need in life?
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!
The loudest anthems in Party Rock, Pop Punk, Emo & Indie from the 90s & 00s. Expect Blink-182, Avril, Green Day, Nirvana, The Killers & much more!
40 classic rock anthems back to back - one from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 00s. Expect monster anthems from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte & many more!
What, none of these song ever reached the Top 10 on the singles chart?! You're joking, right?! Prepare to gasp at the shoddy peak positions from big stars like Amy, Justin & Pink!

programmes.show_name: As Seen On TV with Robin Banks
programmes.show_description: Robin Banks' chart with big TV connections - could be theme tunes, Comic Relief, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show. Our top 25 chart is Absolutely Fabulous!
Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
60 minutes of acts that had a single smash hit number 1, then never darkened the top 20 ever again! From Maria McKee in 1990 to Baz Luhrmann at the end of the decade.
Starting in 2005, all top 10 hits, 20 of Rihanna's biggest anthems & killer collaborations featuring David Guetta, Eminem, Jay Z, Calvin Harris & even Paul McCartney!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from indie rock, singer-songwriters & girl bands to dance, R&B and the early emergence of UK garage & grime.
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles in 2006, all smash hits 20 years ago! Plus a song about a JCB!
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more could you possibly need in life?

programmes.show_name: Cuddle on the Couch - The Love 50
programmes.show_description: 4 hours of 00s love. What more could you ask for? We all need a cuddle on the couch every now and again.
Month by month Bruno Brookes plays 12 lesser-known hits of 1990! Including Paul Simon & Janet Jackson, plus forgotten acts like Candy Dulfer & River City People.
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from Britpop, Boybands & R&B to the birth of electronic dance beats!
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year we said hello to Gladiators, Heartbeat & The Big Breakfast on the TV and WH Smiths said goodbye to vinyl records in their stores!
60 minutes of back to back runners up from 1993 - from Bryan & Bitty to M People & Snap. With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
Radio 1 & Top of the Pops legend Gary Davies with the iconic images & award winning clips that set the style of 1994. Including Oasis, Blur, Green Day, Prince & Nirvana.
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Dedicated to that someone special, timeless 90s love songs all from the heart.
Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 00s love songs - heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in an 8 hour marathon! Expect Take That, Dido, Leona & Michael Buble.
A little bit of love in the 90s from the likes of Take That, George Michael, Boyzone, Whitney Houston, Celine Dion and a load more.
Sit back and absorb the dulcet tones of Canadian crooner Michael Buble. From 2005's debut hit 'Home' to the epic 'Cry Me A River' in 2009.
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more could you possibly need in life?

programmes.show_name: Mark Goodier: UK Top 40 of the 00s
programmes.show_description: Mark Goodier with the 40 biggest selling singles of the decade. Including 35 UK number 1s and big million-selling hits from Girls Aloud, Shakira and James Blunt.
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
